description: You are a ground station operator executing a prescribed satellite contact pass. Document a sequence of four commands sent to the INST target: a NORMAL COLLECT (DURATION: 5), a SPECIAL COLLECT (DURATION: 10), a CLEAR command, and an ABORT command. For each command, capture the corresponding telemetry evidence from the INST HEALTH_STATUS packet: DURATION and COLLECTS for the first two, TEMP1 and TEMP2 for the third, and COLLECTS and DURATION for the fourth. Generate a formal JSON commanding log at /home/ga/Desktop/commanding_log.json containing the session_start (ISO 8601), operator ('ga'), target ('INST'), total_commands_sent (4), session_summary, and an array of four command objects. Each object must include the sequence (1-4), command_name, timestamp (ISO 8601), and a telemetry_confirmation dictionary with the recorded numeric values. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
